title: What if I told you that you can build an enterprise-grade SOC from scratch, entirely within a 4GB RAM footprint? 🖥️🛡️ I just engineered a containerized SOC home lab to simulate and detect high-severity web attacks—under extreme resource constraints. 🧱 Th - LinkedIn

What if I told you that you can build an enterprise-grade SOC from scratch, entirely within a 4GB RAM footprint? 🖥️🛡️ I just engineered a containerized SOC home lab to simulate and detect high-severity web attacks—under extreme resource constraints. 🧱 Th &nbsp;&nbsp; LinkedIn
